titles.title: In My Life Lord Be Glorified

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In my life, Lord, be glorified, be glorified In my life. Lord, be glorified today.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In your Bride, Lord, be glorified, be glorified, In your Bride, Lord, be glorified today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In your Word, Lord be glorified, be glorified, In your Word, Lord, be glorified today.
